{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Sandviper chief
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Soulsmith (novel)|Soulsmith]]
}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The current [[Sandviper chief]] is a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c7">''Soulsmith'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
